source_pr.title: *: replace gofail with the new failpoint implementation
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Lonng <chris@lonng.org>

<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Replace [gofail](https://github.com/pingcap/gofail) with the new failpoint implementation [failpoint](https://github.com/pingcap/failpoint)

### What is changed and how it works?

Replace all dependencies and failpoints trigger condition.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
 - Integration test

Code changes


Side effects


Related changes

fix_pattern: *: replace gofail with the new failpoint implementation
